metadata.description: UltraExplainer — generate strikingly clear, self-contained HTML visual explanations from code, systems, diffs, and plans.

plugins.name: ultra-explainer
plugins.description: Turn code, systems, diffs, and plans into strikingly clear self-contained HTML — node-edge graphs with routed arrows, annotated diffs, dashboards, timelines, slides, and custom SVG illustrations. Futuristic 'Aurora' design system with an optional glow layer and light/dark themes.
